name: aiv-workflow
description: Agent workflow layer for the AIV protocol: skills that drive a project from audit finding to merge (launch-brief, check-drift, start-pr, ground-yourself, design-tests, aiv-packet, prove-it, or-review, aiv-audit, rigor-audit, poll-ci). Calls the aiv-protocol `aiv` CLI for all substrate operations; never reimplements the spec.
